tailwind.container: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-xl border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden
tailwind.header_cells: px-6 py-4 text-xs font-bold text-blue-800 uppercase tracking-wider
tailwind.numeric: font-mono font-medium text-blue-600 bg-blue-50 px-2 py-1 rounded

tailwind.container: p-8 bg-white shadow-2xl rounded-2xl border border-gray-50 hover:border-blue-100 transition-all
tailwind.title: text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4
tailwind.input: w-full px-4 py-3 bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl focus:bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 outline-none transition-all

tailwind.primary: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border border-blue-100 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold tracking-wide
tailwind.success: bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-700 border border-emerald-100 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold tracking-wide

tailwind.primary: bg-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-700 active:scale-95 text-white font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-xl shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/20 transition-all
tailwind.success: bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-700 active:scale-95 text-white font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-xl shadow-lg shadow-emerald-500/20 transition-all
tailwind.outline: text-blue-600 border-2 border-blue-600 hover:bg-blue-50 font-semibold px-6 py-3 rounded-xl transition-all
